sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Wolfe Research Adjusts Price Target on CSX to $46 From $44, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Wolfe Research has increased its price target for CSX Corporation to $46 from $44, while reiterating an Outperform rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects analysts' views on the company's valuation and future prospects. The article also lists other recent analyst adjustments for CSX.

feed.title: News - Wynn Resorts data breach impacts over 21,000 employees following HR system attack
feed.summary: Wynn Resorts, a luxury hospitality and gaming company, recently disclosed a data breach that affected over 21,000 employees. The breach, which occurred in October 2025 following a cyberattack on its internal HR systems, compromised personal information.

feed.title: BD Launches HemoSphere Stream Module for Continuous Blood Pressure Monitoring
feed.summary: BD has launched its HemoSphere Stream™ Module, a new noninvasive technology for continuous blood pressure monitoring. This module, used with the VitaWave™ Plus Finger Cuff, provides real-time arterial waveform data, improving patient safety by allowing earlier detection of hemodynamic changes. The innovation aims to enhance care quality and solidify BD's leadership in medical technology.

feed.title: Notice of BetMGM 1Q 2026 Update and Conference Call
feed.summary: BetMGM LLC, a joint venture between MGM Resorts International and Entain plc, announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 business update on Tuesday, April 14, 2026. The update will cover the period from January 1 to March 31, 2026, and will be followed by a webcast call and Q&A session for investors. This notice also provides details for upcoming results from Entain and MGM Resorts International.

feed.title: North America's biggest grid gets new backup power, savings option
feed.summary: Generac (NYSE: GNRC) and CPower announced a collaboration to deploy distributed energy resources (DER) across PJM, North America's largest grid. This partnership aims to enhance resiliency, reduce energy costs for commercial and industrial (C&I) customers, and enable access to wholesale revenue streams. By combining Generac's C&I product portfolio and dealer network with CPower's 6.7 GW Virtual Power Plant (VPP) capacity and market access, the initiative will allow C&I customers to participate in capacity, ancillary services, energy, and on-bill programs.

feed.title: Generac and CPower Expand Access to DER Technologies to Support Resiliency, Energy Costs and Grid Capacity
feed.summary: Generac Holdings Inc. and CPower Energy have announced a collaboration to provide Distributed Energy Resources (DER) technologies to commercial and industrial (C&I) customers in PJM, North America's largest electricity market. This partnership combines Generac's DER solutions with CPower's Virtual Power Plant (VPP) and demand response services, allowing customers to utilize distributed generation like battery energy storage systems and microgrids. The initiative aims to enhance energy resiliency, reduce costs, and strengthen grid capacity by enabling C&I customers to participate in various energy programs.

feed.title: Raymond James Trims Price Target on Truist Financial to $53 From $56, Keeps Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Raymond James has lowered its price target for Truist Financial (TFC) to $53 from $56, while maintaining an Outperform rating on the stock. This adjustment follows similar actions by other firms, with JPMorgan also adjusting its target to $51.50 and Goldman Sachs to $54. Despite these target reductions, Truist Financial continues to receive positive ratings like "Outperform" and "Buy" from several analysts.

feed.title: Jefferies cuts First Solar stock price target on logistics cost concerns
feed.summary: Jefferies has lowered its price target for First Solar Inc. (NASDAQ:FSLR) to $187 from $205, maintaining a Hold rating due to growing concerns about inflationary logistics costs caused by the Middle East conflict. The firm anticipates these costs will impact near-term margins and reduced its fiscal year 2026 margin profile. The stock has already seen a 25% decline year-to-date, despite First Solar being considered undervalued relative to its Fair Value by InvestingPro analysis.

feed.title: Sionna Therapeutics to Participate in the Raymond James 2026 Biotech Innovation Symposium
feed.summary: Sionna Therapeutics, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on cystic fibrosis treatments, announced its management will participate in one-on-one investor meetings at the Raymond James 2026 Biotech Innovation Symposium on April 14, 2026. The company is developing novel medicines to normalize CFTR protein function, specifically targeting the F508del genetic mutation. Sionna aims to improve clinical outcomes and quality of life for CF patients through its pipeline of NBD1 stabilizers and complementary CFTR modulators.

feed.title: Inlet Private Wealth LLC Takes $1.38 Million Position in General Dynamics Corporation $GD
feed.summary: Inlet Private Wealth LLC has acquired a new stake of 4,089 shares, valued at approximately $1.38 million, in General Dynamics Corporation (NYSE:GD) during the fourth quarter. The company has a "Moderate Buy" analyst rating with an average target price of $384.42, reported strong quarterly earnings of $4.17 EPS and $14.38 billion in revenue, and raised its quarterly dividend to $1.59. Despite insider sales totaling over $18 million in the last 90 days, institutional investors own a significant 86.14% of the stock.

feed.title: Newbridge Financial Services Group Inc. Cuts Stock Position in AT&T Inc. $T
feed.summary: Newbridge Financial Services Group Inc. significantly reduced its holdings in AT&T Inc. by 87.2% during the fourth quarter, selling 262,882 shares and ending with 38,431 shares valued at $955,000. Despite this reduction, other institutional investors increased their positions in AT&T, and the company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price of $30.74. AT&T also recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.2775 per share, yielding 3.9% annually, and reported strong Q4 2025 earnings, beating analyst estimates.

feed.title: Inlet Private Wealth LLC Decreases Stake in Seagate Technology Holdings PLC $STX
feed.summary: Inlet Private Wealth LLC reduced its stake in Seagate Technology Holdings PLC (NASDAQ:STX) by 20.9% in the fourth quarter, selling 12,464 shares to hold 47,186 shares valued at $12.995 million. Despite this reduction by one firm, institutional ownership remains high at 92.87%, with several other hedge funds increasing their positions. Seagate continues to show strong financial performance, with analysts issuing multiple upgrades and a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating, driven by robust earnings beats, dividend announcements, and positive sentiment linked to AI/data-center expansion.

feed.title: BTIG Adjusts Price Target on ServiceNow to $185 From $200, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: BTIG has revised its price target for ServiceNow (NYSE: NOW) to $185 from $200, while continuing to recommend a "Buy" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes despite several other firms also modifying their price targets for ServiceNow recently, reflecting ongoing analyst evaluations of the company's financial outlook. ServiceNow, a developer of digital workflow solutions, remains a focus for institutional investors.

feed.title: Raymond James Downgrades Axos Financial (AX) Price Target | AX S
feed.summary: Raymond James has lowered its price target for Axos Financial (AX) from $110.00 to $100.00 but upgraded the stock's rating from "Outperform" to "Strong Buy." This adjustment comes despite several other analysts maintaining or raising their price targets for AX. Axos Financial, a bank holding company, focuses on financing residential properties and small to medium-sized businesses, primarily in California.

feed.title: Jefferies Adjusts Price Target on Chubb to $356 From $333, Maintains Hold Rating
feed.summary: Jefferies has increased its price target for Chubb Limited (CB) to $356 from $333, while reiterating a "Hold" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes as other analysts, including HSBC, Wolfe Research, and Goldman Sachs, have also recently updated their price targets and ratings for the Multiline Insurance & Brokers company. Chubb Limited is a Switzerland-based holding company offering a wide range of insurance and reinsurance products globally.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs reinstates Fifth Third Bancorp stock coverage with buy rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has reinstated coverage of Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) with a Buy rating and a $55.00 price target, predicting a 16% upside from its current trading price of $47.56. This positive outlook follows Fifth Third Bancorp's acquisition of Comerica Bank, with Goldman Sachs anticipating significant cost savings and revenue synergies from the merger. The bank is expected to achieve a return on tangible common equity of approximately 19% or higher, alongside continued dividend increases.

feed.title: JPMorgan Adjusts Price Target on Norfolk Southern to $292 From $296, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: JPMorgan has revised its price target for Norfolk Southern (NYSE: NSC) down to $292 from $296, while retaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst activities for the company, including Wolfe Research raising its target and Jefferies lowering theirs. Norfolk Southern specializes in rail freight and intermodal transportation, with its earnings call for Q1 2026 scheduled for April 24, 2026.

feed.title: RTX wins $709 million contract for GBU-53/B StormBreaker guided bombs production
feed.summary: RTX Corporation has secured a $709 million contract from the U.S. Department of War for the 12th production lot of GBU-53/B StormBreaker guided bombs, scheduled for completion by February 2030. An initial $338 million has been released, with over half ($171.5 million) financed by international customers including Belgium, Canada, Finland, Germany, Italy, Norway, South Korea, and Switzerland, all of whom operate the F-35A Lightning II. The StormBreaker is a 93-kilogram precision-guided bomb designed to engage both stationary and moving targets, enhancing combat aircraft capabilities by allowing more munitions per mission.

feed.title: Devon Energy Corp stock: Merger clearance sparks scale questions for investors
feed.summary: Devon Energy has received regulatory clearance for its acquisition of Coterra Energy, a move that could create one of the largest U.S. oil and gas operators and significantly reshape Devon's asset and cash flow profile. This merger aligns with industry trends towards consolidation, aiming to boost efficiency and competitiveness. Investors are advised to consider the implications of this scale, Devon's consistent financial performance, analyst optimism, and potential risks like oil and gas price volatility and integration challenges.

feed.title: Blood pressure checks every 3–5 minutes leave gaps; BD offers a live view
feed.summary: BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) has launched the HemoSphere Stream™ Module, a new device that provides continuous, noninvasive, beat-to-beat arterial waveform data to compatible bedside monitors. This system, used with the VitaWave™ Plus Finger Cuff, aims to eliminate blind spots from intermittent blood pressure checks, typically taken every 3-5 minutes, and enhance patient safety by allowing for earlier detection and treatment of hemodynamic changes. The technology has been validated against arterial line measurements and supports APSF recommendations for continuous noninvasive hemodynamic monitoring, particularly important during and after surgery.

feed.title: Wells Fargo assumes Pinterest stock coverage with overweight rating
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has initiated coverage on Pinterest Inc (NYSE:PINS) with an Overweight rating and a $25.00 price target, highlighting the stock's undervaluation according to InvestingPro analysis. The firm adjusted its 2026 revenue and EBITDA estimates due to mixed market checks and anticipated macro impacts from the Iran War. Pinterest is actively repurchasing $2.0 billion in stock, funded partly by convertible bonds issued to Elliott Management, maintaining a net cash position.

feed.title: Rathbones Group PLC Sells 12,766 Shares of Medtronic PLC $MDT
feed.summary: Rathbones Group PLC reduced its stake in Medtronic PLC by 19.5% in the fourth quarter, selling 12,766 shares but still holding 52,746 shares valued at approximately $5.07 million. This comes as Medtronic modestly exceeded Q4 expectations and provided optimistic FY2026 guidance, despite a significant insider share sale by EVP Harry Skip Kiil. The company's stock has an average "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts, with a consensus price target of $109.85.

feed.title: Form DEFA14A ROSS STORES, INC.
feed.summary: This article is a filing of Form DEFA14A (Definitive Additional Materials) by ROSS STORES, INC. with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. This form is a type of proxy statement filed pursuant to Section 14(a) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, indicating that the filing does not require a fee.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific appoints Somya Sugandha as VP HR, APMEA
feed.summary: Somya Sugandha has been appointed as Vice President, Human Resources for the APMEA region at Thermo Fisher Scientific. With over 25 years of experience from companies like Alstom, General Electric, and GE Vernova, Sugandha will be responsible for aligning people strategy, driving talent strategy, and enhancing organizational effectiveness. Her role will focus on fostering growth and cultural transformation within the diverse APMEA region.

feed.title: Rathbones Group PLC Cuts Position in Roper Technologies, Inc. $ROP
feed.summary: Rathbones Group PLC significantly reduced its stake in Roper Technologies, Inc. by 73.4% in the fourth quarter, selling over 100,000 shares. Despite this, other institutional investors increased their positions, and analysts hold a "Hold" consensus rating with a target price of $476.60. Roper Technologies slightly exceeded Q4 EPS expectations and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.91 per share.

feed.title: Portside Wealth Group LLC Buys 19,212 Shares of ServiceNow, Inc. $NOW
feed.summary: Portside Wealth Group LLC significantly increased its stake in ServiceNow, Inc. ($NOW) by 426.1% in Q4, acquiring an additional 19,212 shares, bringing their total holdings to 23,721 shares valued at $3.63 million. ServiceNow delivered strong Q4 earnings, surpassing analyst expectations with EPS of $0.92 and revenue of $3.57 billion, marking a 20.7% year-over-year increase. Despite recent insider selling, institutional investors hold a substantial portion of the company's stock, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price significantly above the current trading price.

feed.title: Amazon And USPS Strike Deal On Package Handling, Averting Major Cutback: Report
feed.summary: Amazon (NASDAQ:AMZN) and the U.S. Postal Service (USPS) have reached an agreement to reduce the number of packages Amazon sends through USPS by 20%, averting Amazon's initial threat of a two-thirds reduction. This deal is still pending review and approval by the Postal Regulatory Commission. The USPS, which handled over 1 billion Amazon packages last year, relies heavily on Amazon's volume for revenue, while Amazon depends on USPS for last-mile delivery, especially in rural areas.

feed.title: Rathbones Group PLC Acquires 117,272 Shares of Veralto Corporation $VLTO
feed.summary: Rathbones Group PLC significantly increased its stake in Veralto Corporation (NYSE:VLTO) by 205.9% in the fourth quarter, purchasing an additional 117,272 shares to bring its total holdings to 174,223 shares, valued at $17.38 million. The article details Veralto's Q4 financial results, including an EPS beat and slightly missed revenue, along with its FY2026 guidance. It also provides an overview of Veralto's stock performance, dividend declaration, and current analyst ratings, which indicate a "Moderate Buy" consensus.

feed.title: Raymond James Upgrades Axos Financial to Strong Buy From Outperform, Trims Price Target to $100 From $110
feed.summary: Raymond James has upgraded Axos Financial (NYSE:AX) to "Strong Buy" from "Outperform," while also trimming its price target from $110 to $100. The article also includes recent news snippets related to Axos Financial, such as its acquisition of Jenius Bank's US consumer deposits and insider stock sales. Additionally, it provides an overview of Axos Financial's company profile, including its segments and financial data.

feed.title: Rathbones Group PLC Sells 163,243 Shares of Electronic Arts Inc. $EA
feed.summary: Rathbones Group PLC significantly reduced its stake in Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ:EA) by 84.5% in the fourth quarter, selling 163,243 shares and leaving them with 29,993 shares valued at approximately $6.13 million. Despite this, other institutional investors have recently increased their holdings in EA. The article also details recent insider selling activity and analyst ratings, with a consensus "Hold" rating and a price target of $188.30 against a current trading price near $204.

feed.title: MetLife reports preliminary Q1 variable investment income of $475-$525 million By Investing.com
feed.summary: MetLife Inc. announced preliminary Q1 variable investment income of $475-$525 million before taxes for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, which includes income from private equity, real estate, and prepayment fees. The company's full-year 2026 guidance for variable investment income remains at about $1.6 billion before taxes. These unaudited estimates are based on current information, and final results will be released on May 6, 2026, alongside their full quarterly earnings report.

feed.title: Biogen’s Apellis Deal And High Dose SPINRAZA Shift Growth Outlook
feed.summary: Biogen has expanded its neurology and rare disease portfolio by acquiring Apellis Pharmaceuticals and securing FDA approval for a high-dose regimen of SPINRAZA for spinal muscular atrophy. These strategic moves aim to diversify Biogen's pipeline and revenue streams, particularly within the growing market for rare disease and specialty medicines. Investors will be closely watching the integration of Apellis' assets and the adoption rate of the new SPINRAZA regimen to assess their impact on the company's financial performance.

feed.title: WEX 260417 185.00P (WEX260417P185000) Stock Options Chain | Quotes & News
feed.summary: This article provides details for the WEX 260417 185.00P stock options chain, identified by the symbol WEX260417P185000. It likely includes quotes and news pertaining to these specific options.

feed.title: Citi Downgrades Insulet Corporation (PODD) to Neutral
feed.summary: Citi analyst Joanna Wuensch downgraded Insulet Corporation (NASDAQ: PODD) to Neutral. The article is premium-only content, requiring a subscription to StreetInsider.com to view the full details of the downgrade.

feed.title: Savvy Advisors Boosts Quanta Services Stake by 180%
feed.summary: Savvy Advisors Inc. significantly increased its stake in Quanta Services (NYSE:PWR) by 179.8% in Q4 2025, bringing its holdings to 3,685 shares valued at $1.55 million. This reflects the investment firm's confidence in Quanta Services, a major player in electric power, pipeline, and communications infrastructure, which has shown strong financial performance and stock price growth, reaching a 52-week high of $583.73 in March 2026. The increased investment underscores the growth potential of the construction and infrastructure services company.

feed.title: Cementos Pacasmayo Flags Holcim’s Intent to Delist ADS from NYSE After Tender Offer
feed.summary: Cementos Pacasmayo announced that its controlling shareholder, Holcim Ltd., intends to delist the company's ADS from the NYSE and cancel its U.S. registration following a mandatory tender offer. Cementos Pacasmayo emphasized that this is currently only an intention expressed by Holcim, not a final company decision. The potential delisting could impact the liquidity and accessibility of the company's American Depositary Shares for international investors.

feed.title: HSBC Adjusts Price Target on American International Group to $89 From $90, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: HSBC has revised its price target for American International Group (AIG) to $89, a slight decrease from its previous target of $90. Despite this adjustment, the firm has chosen to maintain its 'Buy' rating on the insurance giant. This update comes amidst other analyst adjustments for AIG from firms like Morgan Stanley, UBS, Cantor Fitzgerald, and Wells Fargo, which have also recently tweaked their price targets for the company.

feed.title: Outset Medical adds former Stryker leader as new EVP of commercial
feed.summary: Outset Medical has appointed Derick Elliott, formerly of Stryker and Cardinal Health, as its new Executive Vice President of Commercial. Effective immediately, Elliott will oversee the company's commercial organizations supporting acute, post-acute, and home healthcare providers. His extensive experience in medtech sales and marketing, including his previous role as CCO at SpendMed, aligns with Outset Medical's strategy for its portable hemodialysis system, Tablo.

feed.title: JPMorgan Adjusts Price Target on U.S. Bancorp to $58 From $62, Maintains Underweight Rating
feed.summary: JPMorgan has lowered its price target for U.S. Bancorp (USB) to $58 from $62, while keeping an "Underweight" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes alongside similar actions from other analysts, including Evercore ISI and Autonomous Research, who also recently revised their price targets for U.S. Bancorp. The report indicates a general trend among financial institutions to re-evaluate their outlook on the company.

feed.title: Fifth Third analysts lower view of bank’s stock price, earnings outlook
feed.summary: Investment analysts have reduced their outlook for Fifth Third Bancorp's stock and earnings following the bank's first-quarter guidance and a general downturn in bank stocks. Several analysts are now less optimistic about the company's future prospects.

feed.title: Broadridge live with onchain governance for tokenised equities
feed.summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions has expanded its governance platform to incorporate digital assets, allowing for proxy voting, corporate actions, and disclosures across both traditional and tokenized securities. Galaxy will be one of the first to utilize this platform for its annual meeting and shareholder vote in May. This development aims to streamline governance for tokenized equities by consolidating voting data and integrating with digital wallets for investors.

In related news, ITW saw major insider selling from EVP Axel Beck and Director Ernest Scott Santi, who collectively sold a large number of shares. Despite these reductions, ITW reported strong Q4 earnings, beating analyst expectations, and announced a quarterly dividend, though the stock currently holds an average analyst consensus of "Reduce."

feed.title: Molson Coors Beverage Company to Webcast 2026 First Quarter Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: Molson Coors Beverage Company will host a webcast for its 2026 First Quarter Earnings Conference Call on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time.
